titleStmt.title: SII 26.712: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 712. (A.R. No. 661 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra of the same temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājarājadēva III: Year 24+1, Mēsha (Chittirai) ba. 8, Friday, Śrāvaṇam = 1241 A.D., April 5.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in several places.

It records that the right of supplying lily garlands to the temple of Tirunalamuḍaiyār of Tirunalam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, for daily use, and for festivals in the months of Mārgaḻi and Vaikāśi was there and that this arrangement was in the hands of a certain Tiruvīḻimiḻalai-uḍaiyār of Nāgaṉpāḍi from the 13th year in an unauthorised manner and this right was purchased from him, as he was not able to meet the demand. From the 17th year this right was assigned to [•••••] Śelvaṉ alias Poṟkōyil Śōḻappallavaraiyaṉ and his younger brother Śēndappiḷḷai alias Rājarājappallavaraiyaṉ, who were temple florists. The Māhēśvarars and the tāṉattār decided that they should supply 18,250 garlands per year at 50 garlands a day for daily worship; 44,000 garlands for the festival in the month of Mārgaḻi and 77,660 garlands for the festival in the month of Vaikāśi, all told 1,39,710 garlands. It is stated that the cost for this amounted to 12[2]00 kāśu, and its equivalent in seed paddy was 511-1/4 kalam. It is stated that in order to provide for this, lands in the eastern section of Brahmadēyam Tirunallam were assigned to the two abovementioned florists who were also provided with houses.

At the end it is stated that in case of floods and drought and government confiscation, the quantities of the yields would be decided by the Māhēśvaras and the tāṉattārs and according to the decision, the number of garlands would be supplied by the florists.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu Irupattunālāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa[ ttu A] ṣṭamiyum veḷḷik kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu
Uṭaiyār tirunalamuṭaiyār koyil nittaṟpaṭi ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷit tāmamum tirumākkaḻi tirunāḷukkum tiruvaikācit tirunāḷukkum tiṅkaḷ tirunā(ḷukku)ḷukkum tiruppaḷittāma ḷamuṉpilāṇṭu kankoma
mar Aṉusāramāy kaivantapaṭi patuvaru patiṉmuṉṟāvatu mutal Akāraṇamāka Aṉusarikkiṟa nākaṉpāṭi Uṭaiyār tiruviḻimiḻalai Uṭaiyār kaivvilaikoṇṭu tevai Aṟukka Oṇṇātamai
yil tirupūttoṇṭarkaḷil kuvaḷai kka �ṉ celvaṉāṉa poṟkoyil coḻappallavarayaṉukkum tampi centappiḷḷaiyāṉa rājarājappallavarayaṉukkum patiṉeḻāvatu mutal śrīmā
heśvararum tāṉattārum Iruntu nittaṟpaṭi tirunāḷkaḷukku Eṇṇa veṇṭum tiruppaḷḷittāmam niccayitta nittaṟpaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aimpatāka tiruppaḷittāmam patiṉeṇṇāyira
ttirunūṟṟaimpatum tirumārkaḻit tirunāḷukku Eṇṇum tiruppaḷittāmam nāṟpattu nālāyiramum tiruvaikācit tirunāḷukku Eṇṇum tiruppaḷittāmam Eḻupatteḻāyirattu Aṟunūṟṟaṟupatum Āka ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷi
ttāmam nūṟāyirattu muppattoṉpatiṉāyiratteḻunūṟṟorupatum kācu paṉṉirāyirat nūṟṟukku ciṉai nel vilai kācu Oṉṟukku kuṭu
kka niccayitta nellu Aiññūṟṟorupattoru kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻikku kāṇiyāka Aṭaitta brahmadeyan tirunalattukkiḻ Iṟaiyili cempiyaṉmātevivatikku kiḻakku Aticeya pāṇṭi
vaṭakku 2 kū 1 catirattu 1000 6 100 3 10 2 rūpāy mūn_ṛumā (1/2)ma 1000 2 100 2 10 4 nilam 2mā ma Iṅke 3 9—1 catirattu tiruttoṇi 1000 2 100 2 10 4 nilam ndha ¿ yum nilam (1/2)ma � 100 2 rūpāy 2 nilam (1/2)ma tevatāṉa veḷḷaiyūril tiruna
taṅkoṭaik kaṇṭattu 1000 6 100 3 10 2 nilam kha ṅ m kiḻaṭai kulaiyil Iluppai Uṭaiyāṉ tiruciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ pakkal vilaikkoṇṭa 1000 2 100 2 10 4 nilam kha (1/4)ma Āka nilam 1 mukkāl kiḻakku (1/2) ṉāl
varicaippaṭi I 5 100 10 4 100 9 � 6 10 2 Innellu Aiññūṟṟorupattoru kalaṉeaṟunāḻikkum Innilaṅkaḷ kāṇiyākak koṇṭu Eṇṇa niccayittappaṭiye tiruppaḷittāmaṅkaḷ Eṇṇa nāḷkaḷu
kku tevai Aṟaveṇṭum tiruppaḷittāmam Eṇṇa Eṇṇāta tiruppaḷittāmam ṅkaḷt tirunākkaḷukku Eṇavum niccayittappaṭiye cantirātittavarai cellavum Itu Aḻippā
ciyāñai cokkaṉāyiṉārāṇai vāṇai puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyārāṇai Ivarkaḷukku kuṭiiruppāka niccayitta kiḻait tirumaṭai viḷākattu tiruñāṉacampantappiccaṉ maṉaikku teṟkku poṟkoyil
coḻappallavaraiya ḷai kol Iraṇṭaraiyum tiruvuṇṇāḻikai piccaṉ maṉaikku vaṭakku rājarājappallavarayaṉukku maṉai Irukoluṅ kāṇiyāka peṟavum Itu Ilaṅkaṉam paṇṇātapaṭi nokkuvār
tiruvaṭinilai Iraṇṭum male Irukkavum Itukku Ilaṅkaṉam paṇṇiṉāruṇṭākil civatturokikaḷ paṭṭa teṇṭam teṇṭip puṇṇakkaṭavarkaḷāka niccayittom nilaṅkalanta [śrī]māhe
śvararum mittāṉattārum Ivaṉaivom Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ peruveḷḷap peruñcāvi potilum rāṣṭra toṭa muṇṭāyppayir Eṟṟap peṟātomitil pañcipotal ceyta Āṇṭukaḷ stāṉattār puṟappaṭa po
m Uṭal pāttu vacameviṭṭu Uṭalukku niccayittapaṭiye taṅka ta cikai kaṭanta tiruppaḷittāmam Uḷppaṭa paṇayattukku
māka Eṇṇakkaṭavarkaḷākavum niccayittuk kuṭuttom Ittāṉattom [§*]
Digital edition of SII 26.712 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
